task.title: Improve Keynu Codex Connector v0.2
task.instructions: Inspect the existing Codex connector and improve it as an AI-agent bridge. Keep KAP as the outer routing and report-tracking envelope, but make the prompt sent to Codex natural English. Explain that Codex is an AI coding agent, not a deterministic app driver. Preserve the v0.1 manual prepare flow and do not add a live Codex API connection.
task.context: Keynu already has a ChatGPT browser-agent flow where ChatGPT sends KAP, BrowserAgent extracts it, Keynu executes the job, and Keynu sends a KAP report back. The Codex bridge should fit into ChatGPT -> Keynu -> Codex -> Keynu -> ChatGPT.
constraints: Keep the existing prepare command working.
Use natural English for the task instructions sent to Codex.
Use KAP only for routing, tracking, and reports.
